faqs.question: What does your $350-$550 drain fly treatment include?
faqs.answer: Our drain fly treatment includes a thorough inspection to locate breeding sites, professional cleaning and treatment of affected drains, application of bio-enzymatic solutions to eliminate organic buildup, follow-up recommendations, and a service guarantee. faqs.question: Why do I have drain flies in my East Elmhurst property?
faqs.answer: Drain flies thrive in the organic matter that accumulates in drains, particularly in kitchens, bathrooms, and basement floor drains. East Elmhurst's older plumbing systems and humid conditions near LaGuardia and Flushing Bay create ideal breeding environments. Poor ventilation, infrequent drain cleaning, and standing water in pipes all contribute to drain fly problems.

faqs.question: How can I prevent drain flies from returning after treatment?
faqs.answer: After our treatment, regular drain maintenance is key. We recommend weekly cleaning with hot water and brush scrubbing, monthly bio-enzymatic drain treatments, ensuring proper ventilation in bathrooms and kitchens, and promptly fixing any leaks. Our technicians will provide specific prevention strategies based on your East Elmhurst property's unique conditions.
